extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I counted only the Against our Company, Against our Directors, Against our Promoters and Against our Subsidiaries rows. Criminal proceedings against all listed entities are Nil (0), statutory/regulatory actions against all listed entities are Nil (0), and tax proceedings against the company and subsidiaries are 10 and 1 respectively, totaling 11; the By rows were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is ₹105.34 million plus ₹2.06 million, or ₹107.40 million = ₹10.74 crore; promoter/director personal matters and all By matters were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹32,554.69 million as of June 30, 2024, converted to ₹3,255.469 crore without re-summing; the source tables use ₹ million. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, is based on revenue from operations: top five customers were 43.41% and top ten customers were 67.03%.
